title: Parcel Review Workflow Clarity and Executive Report Action Redesign

top_nav_behavior.due_diligence: Opens the Parcel Review workspace on the Review view.
top_nav_behavior.executive_report: Opens the same Parcel Review workspace directly on the Executive Summary view.
top_nav_behavior.label_change: Executive Print remains functionally supported by the legacy product mode but the visible top nav label is Executive Report.
top_nav_behavior.no_parcel_report_behavior: Shows a report-specific empty state: Select a parcel to generate an Executive Report.

no_parcel_empty_state_changes.generic_review_title: Select a parcel to begin review
no_parcel_empty_state_changes.report_specific_title: Select a parcel to generate an Executive Report
no_parcel_empty_state_changes.message: Use the top search bar or click a live map marker. Once selected, CFS will show review flags, zoning, activity, flood, school, transportation, utility proxy, and report options.
locked_action_cards: Parcel Review - Locked until parcel selected.
Executive Summary - Select a parcel to generate report preview.
Print Report - Select a parcel before printing.

selected_parcel_command_header_changes.title: Parcel Review Workspace
selected_parcel_command_header_changes.subtitle: Review selected parcel context, constraints, activity, and generate a printable executive summary from the same evidence.

review_tab_changes.main_view: Review remains the working Due Diligence view.
review_tab_changes.development_cleanup: Development Activity and New Construction Permit History were combined into one stronger Development & New Construction section.
review_tab_changes.constraints_cleanup: Flood, school, transportation, and utility proxy cards are grouped under Constraints & Services.

executive_summary_tab_changes.preview_subtext: This report is generated from the selected parcel review context and is formatted for stakeholder discussion or printing.
executive_summary_tab_changes.component_reuse: ExecutivePrintView is still reused for the print-ready report body.

print_report_behavior.no_parcel: No active print button is shown; locked card says Select a parcel before printing.
print_report_behavior.selected_parcel: Header Print Report switches to the Executive Summary view and calls window.print() after the report view is ready.
print_report_behavior.print_css: Existing print CSS remains responsible for hiding app chrome, nav, sidebars, and interactive controls.

documentation_updates.summary: Updated product-mode descriptions to describe Due Diligence as the Parcel Review workspace and Executive Report as the executive summary shortcut.
Updated demo flow and talking points around Parcel Review, Executive Summary, and Print Report.
Updated checklist language from Executive Print to Executive Report / Executive Summary.

safety_verification.source_grep_note: Prediction-related names remain in API type definitions and aggregate internal research hooks only; browser smoke showed none as visible parcel-level workflow outputs.

validation_results.build_note: The first build attempt timed out while the active Next dev server held .next/dev/lock. The CFS frontend listener was stopped, build reran successfully, and npm run dev:cfs was restarted afterward.

smoke_test_results.parcel_search: passed via top search using keypress input
known_warnings: ArcGIS draped graphics label-placement warnings remain.
smoke_test_results.browser_test_note: Some automated text assertions were case-sensitive while CSS renders selected labels uppercase; functional and visible workflow checks passed.

remaining_known_issues: ArcGIS label-placement warnings remain unrelated to this workflow.
The Browser plugin virtual clipboard is not installed, so automated search entry used keypress events instead of clipboard-based fill/type.
